content.json:
# 💸 Top 10 Resource Groups — Cost Increase vs Last Month

Surfaces the **10 resource groups with the largest absolute cost increase** in the current billing month compared to the previous one.  
Data source: `AzureCosts_CL` (ingested by the CostImporter Azure Function).

> **Note:** Comparison uses `BillingPeriodStartDate` (when the cost was *incurred*), not ingestion time.

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type == 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id, name
| order by name asc

content.query:
let thisMonth    = startofmonth(now());
let lastMonth    = startofmonth(datetime_add('month', -1, now()));
let currency     = toscalar(
    AzureCosts_CL
    | where isnotempty(Currency)
    | take 1
    | project Currency);
let currentCosts =
    AzureCosts_CL
    | where BillingPeriodStartDate >= thisMonth
    | where isnotempty(ResourceGroupName)
    | summarize
        CurrentCost = sum(todouble(CostInBillingCurrency))
        by ResourceGroupName, SubscriptionName;
let previousCosts =
    AzureCosts_CL
    | where BillingPeriodStartDate >= lastMonth
          and BillingPeriodStartDate < thisMonth
    | where isnotempty(ResourceGroupName)
    | summarize
        PreviousCost = sum(todouble(CostInBillingCurrency))
        by ResourceGroupName, SubscriptionName;
currentCosts
| join kind=fullouter previousCosts on ResourceGroupName
| extend
    ResourceGroupName = coalesce(ResourceGroupName, ResourceGroupName1),
    SubscriptionName  = coalesce(SubscriptionName,  SubscriptionName1)
| project-away ResourceGroupName1, SubscriptionName1
| extend
    CurrentCost  = coalesce(CurrentCost,  0.0),
    PreviousCost = coalesce(PreviousCost, 0.0)
| extend
    CostIncrease    = CurrentCost - PreviousCost,
    IncreasePercent = iff(
        PreviousCost > 0,
        round((CurrentCost - PreviousCost) / PreviousCost * 100, 1),
        real(null))
| where CostIncrease > 0
| top 10 by CostIncrease desc
| project
    ['Resource Group'] = ResourceGroupName,
    Subscription       = SubscriptionName,
    ['Last Month']     = round(PreviousCost, 2),
    ['This Month']     = round(CurrentCost, 2),
    ['Δ Cost']         = round(CostIncrease, 2),
    ['Δ %']            = IncreasePercent,
    Currency           = currency
content.title: Top 10 Resource Groups by Cost Increase

content.json:
---
### Chart — cost increase by resource group

content.query:
let thisMonth    = startofmonth(now());
let lastMonth    = startofmonth(datetime_add('month', -1, now()));
let currentCosts =
    AzureCosts_CL
    | where BillingPeriodStartDate >= thisMonth
    | where isnotempty(ResourceGroupName)
    | summarize CurrentCost = sum(todouble(CostInBillingCurrency)) by ResourceGroupName;
let previousCosts =
    AzureCosts_CL
    | where BillingPeriodStartDate >= lastMonth
          and BillingPeriodStartDate < thisMonth
    | where isnotempty(ResourceGroupName)
    | summarize PreviousCost = sum(todouble(CostInBillingCurrency)) by ResourceGroupName;
currentCosts
| join kind=fullouter previousCosts on ResourceGroupName
| extend
    ResourceGroupName = coalesce(ResourceGroupName, ResourceGroupName1)
| project-away ResourceGroupName1
| extend
    CurrentCost  = coalesce(CurrentCost,  0.0),
    PreviousCost = coalesce(PreviousCost, 0.0)
| extend CostIncrease = CurrentCost - PreviousCost
| where CostIncrease > 0
| top 10 by CostIncrease desc
| project ResourceGroupName, ['Last Month'] = round(PreviousCost, 2), ['This Month'] = round(CurrentCost, 2)
content.title: Current vs Previous Month Cost (Top 10 by Increase)
